f35b89fb-3cc2-4e1f-8e58-98165c82df08.name: Notes
f35b89fb-3cc2-4e1f-8e58-98165c82df08.content:
Welcome to protoLabs Studio

This is your workspace notepad. Use it to jot down ideas, track decisions, or leave notes for your team.

Quick Start

  • Board — Create features, track progress, and manage your backlog
  • Agents — AI agents pick up features and implement them in isolated branches
  • Auto-Mode — Queue features with dependencies and let agents work autonomously
  • Context Files — Drop coding standards into .automaker/context/ to guide every agent

Useful Commands

If you're using the Claude Code plugin:

  • /board — View and manage the Kanban board
  • /auto-mode start — Start autonomous feature processing
  • /orchestrate — Set up feature dependencies
  • /plan-project — Plan a full project from an idea

Create new tabs to organize your notes by topic.

a3f1f2e9-abbc-4ae1-9380-7d0416dc1e32.name: Ava
a3f1f2e9-abbc-4ae1-9380-7d0416dc1e32.content:
homeMaker — Ava Operations

Project Direction

Domestic home management hub. AI agent pipeline is core — agents research, plan, organize household tasks. Tailscale-only deployment.

Git Flow

feature/* → dev → main (no staging). PRs target dev, promote dev→main when ready.

Priority Order

  1. M1: Adapt Platform (rebrand, agent context, CI, TS strict)
  2. M6: Home Inventory + Vendors (shared SQLite DB foundation)
  3. M7: Maintenance Scheduling (killer feature)
  4. M2: Sensor Dashboard + History
  5. M3/M4: Budget + Vault
  6. M5: Security Hardening
  7. M8: Integrations (HA, Weather)
